title: helianthemum variabile var. plantagineum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. plantagineum, also known as Rock Rose or Cold Water Plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Helianthemum variabile var. plantagineum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, treat minor wounds, and even alleviate stress and anxiety. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be utilized to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
